description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironFlaunt your phenomonal feminine qualities in style with this tantra t-shirt. Team this t-shirt with jeans and mildly heeled sandals and rule the world of party maniacs in style.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
